GLCT.module.title: GLUniverse — Clocks & Tracker
GLCT.hud.dragHint: Drag to reposition · double-click to switch standard / compact
GLCT.hud.gmTimeHint: GM only — exact time & stretch progress within this watch
GLCT.controls.rewindHint: Left-click to advance · Right-click to rewind
GLCT.controls.missionToggle: Set a mission — count down the stretches to a target time
GLCT.mission.title: Mission Countdown
GLCT.mission.hint: Pin a target and the stretch meter counts down to it: every stretch between now and the target stays individually visible so players can see exactly how many are left.
GLCT.settings.calendar.name: Active Calendar Definition
GLCT.settings.calendar.hint: The stored custom calendar used by this world.
GLCT.settings.events.name: Calendar Events & Holidays
GLCT.settings.events.hint: Stored events and holidays for the active calendar.
GLCT.settings.hudPosition.name: HUD Position
GLCT.settings.hudPosition.hint: Saved screen position of the HUD.
GLCT.settings.hudCollapsed.name: HUD Collapsed
GLCT.settings.sceneLight.name: Tint Scene With Shift
GLCT.settings.sceneLight.hint: Opt-in per scene: tint the canvas to match the current watch.
GLCT.settings.shiftMode.name: Track Time at Shift Level
GLCT.settings.shiftMode.hint: Focus the HUD on the current watch and hide the clock & stretch meter. Time still advances in stretches; this only changes the display. The GM can also flip this from the HUD dock.
GLCT.settings.stepMode.name: Default Step Snapping
GLCT.settings.stepMode.hint: When advancing, snap to the nearest stretch or shift boundary.

GLCT.tracker.emptyHint: No trackers yet — press + to add one.
GLCT.tracker.noGM: No GM is connected to roll this pool.
